auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Tapfiliate API key sent in the X-Api-Key header. Find and manage it in Tapfiliate account settings: https://support.tapfiliate.com/en/articles/1441950-your-api-key.

actions.name: create_affiliate
actions.description: Create a Tapfiliate affiliate with contact, company, address, and custom field data.

password.description: The password for the new affiliate account.

additionalProperties.description: A custom field value accepted by Tapfiliate.

custom_fields.description: Provider-defined affiliate custom fields to send to Tapfiliate.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Tapfiliate affiliate.

anyOf.description: The affiliate's first name when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate's last name when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate's email address when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate company object returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate address object returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate metadata object returned by Tapfiliate.
The parent affiliate id when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate group id when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate creation timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate promotion timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate promotion method returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate custom fields returned by Tapfiliate.

raw.description: The raw affiliate object returned by Tapfiliate.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Tapfiliate affiliate group.

anyOf.description: The affiliate group title.
The number of affiliates in the group when returned.

raw.description: The raw affiliate group object returned by Tapfiliate.

outputSchema.description: The Tapfiliate create affiliate group response.

actions.name: create_click
actions.description: Create a Tapfiliate REST-only tracking click and return its click id for later conversion creation.

referral_code.description: The affiliate referral code obtained from the referral URL.

source_id.description: The source id used by the affiliate when present.

additionalProperties.description: A metadata value accepted by Tapfiliate.

meta_data.description: Provider-defined metadata key-value pairs to send to Tapfiliate.

referrer.description: The HTTP referrer used in Tapfiliate reporting.

landing_page.description: The current landing page used in Tapfiliate reporting.

user_agent.description: The full client user agent string.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Tapfiliate click.

raw.description: The raw create click response returned by Tapfiliate.

actions.name: create_conversion
actions.description: Create a Tapfiliate conversion using a documented referral, customer, click, coupon, tracking, or asset-source matcher.

override_max_cookie_time.description: Whether to override Tapfiliate's maximum cookie time for this conversion.

tracking_id.description: The tracking id retrieved from the Tapfiliate JavaScript library.

click_id.description: The Tapfiliate click id used to add reporting information.

coupon.description: A coupon code used to track the conversion.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO currency code for the conversion.

external_id.description: A unique conversion id from the caller's system.

customer_id.description: The customer id from the caller's system.

commissions.description: Commission overrides to send to Tapfiliate.

additionalProperties.description: A metadata value accepted by Tapfiliate.

meta_data.description: Provider-defined metadata key-value pairs to send to Tapfiliate.

inputSchema.description: Fields for creating a Tapfiliate conversion.

anyOf.description: The numeric Tapfiliate conversion id when returned.
The external conversion id supplied by the merchant.
The conversion amount when returned by Tapfiliate.
The click object associated with this conversion.

commissions.description: The commission objects returned with this conversion.

anyOf.description: The program object associated with this conversion.
The affiliate object associated with this conversion.
The customer object associated with this conversion.
The conversion metadata returned by Tapfiliate.

affiliate_meta_data.description: Affiliate metadata returned with the conversion.

anyOf.description: The conversion creation timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.

warnings.description: Warnings returned by Tapfiliate for this conversion.

raw.description: The raw conversion object returned by Tapfiliate.

actions.name: get_affiliate
actions.description: Retrieve a single Tapfiliate affiliate by affiliate id.

anyOf.description: The affiliate's first name when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate's last name when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate's email address when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate company object returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate address object returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate metadata object returned by Tapfiliate.
The parent affiliate id when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate group id when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate creation timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate promotion timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate promotion method returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate custom fields returned by Tapfiliate.

raw.description: The raw affiliate object returned by Tapfiliate.

page.description: The 1-based Tapfiliate result page to request. Omit this field to request the first page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Tapfiliate affiliate groups.

anyOf.description: The affiliate group title.
The number of affiliates in the group when returned.

raw.description: The raw affiliate group object returned by Tapfiliate.

affiliate_groups.description: The affiliate groups returned by Tapfiliate.

current_page.description: The page requested for this list operation.

anyOf.description: The next page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The previous page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The first page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The last page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The raw Tapfiliate Link header value when present.

pagination.description: Pagination details parsed from Tapfiliate's Link header.

outputSchema.description: The Tapfiliate affiliate groups list response.

actions.name: list_affiliates
actions.description: List Tapfiliate affiliates with optional id, email, referral, and group filters.

page.description: The 1-based Tapfiliate result page to request. Omit this field to request the first page.

click_id.description: A click id used to filter affiliates.

source_id.description: A source id used to filter affiliates.

email.description: An email address used to filter affiliates.

referral_code.description: An affiliate referral code used to filter affiliates.

parent_id.description: A parent affiliate id used to list child affiliates.

affiliate_group_id.description: An affiliate group id used to filter affiliates.

anyOf.description: The affiliate's first name when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate's last name when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate's email address when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate company object returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate address object returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate metadata object returned by Tapfiliate.
The parent affiliate id when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate group id when returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate creation timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate promotion timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate promotion method returned by Tapfiliate.
The affiliate custom fields returned by Tapfiliate.

raw.description: The raw affiliate object returned by Tapfiliate.

current_page.description: The page requested for this list operation.

anyOf.description: The next page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The previous page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The first page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The last page number when Tapfiliate provides one.
The raw Tapfiliate Link header value when present.

pagination.description: Pagination details parsed from Tapfiliate's Link header.

date_from.description: The start date for click filtering.

date_to.description: The end date for click filtering.

meta_data.description: The click metadata returned by Tapfiliate.

actions.name: list_commissions
actions.description: List Tapfiliate commissions with optional affiliate, approval status, and paid filters.

affiliate_id.description: The affiliate id used to filter commissions.

paid.description: Whether to include only paid commissions.

anyOf.description: The numeric Tapfiliate commission id when returned.
The commission amount.
Whether the commission is approved.
The commission creation timestamp returned by Tapfiliate.
The Tapfiliate commission type identifier.

The Tapfiliate commission kind.
The commission currency.
The conversion object associated with this commission.
The affiliate object associated with this commission.

payout.description: The payout value returned by Tapfiliate.

anyOf.description: The commission comment when returned by Tapfiliate.

final.description: The finalization state returned by Tapfiliate.

anyOf.description: The finalization date returned by Tapfiliate.

raw.description: The raw commission object returned by Tapfiliate.

pending.description: Only include conversions that have pending commissions.

date_to.description: The end date for conversion filtering.
